Description

    A container for Access List Control commands.

    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.appendAndForget(String arg0, String arg1)
    Appends a string to the value of a key.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.askingAndForget()
    Signals that a cluster client is following an -ASK redirect.

    RedisAPI.authAndForget(List<String> args)
    Authenticates the connection.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.bfAddAndForget(String arg0, String arg1)
    Adds an item to a Bloom Filter.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.bfAddAndForget(List<String> args)
    Unlike the bare Vert.x variant, this method ignores the Response result or any failure.
    RedisAPI

    Returns the cardinality of a Bloom filter.

    Unlike the bare Vert.x variant, this method ignores the Response result or any failure.

    Unlike the bare Vert.x variant, this method ignores the Response result or any failure.

    Checks whether an item exists in a Bloom Filter.

    Unlike the bare Vert.x variant, this method ignores the Response result or any failure.

    RedisAPI.bfInfoAndForget(List<String> args)
    Returns information about a Bloom Filter.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.bfInsertAndForget(List<String> args)
    Adds one or more items to a Bloom Filter.
    RedisAPI

    Restores a filter previously saved using SCANDUMP.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.bfLoadchunkAndForget(List<String> args)
    Unlike the bare Vert.x variant, this method ignores the Response result or any failure.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.bfMaddAndForget(List<String> args)
    Adds one or more items to a Bloom Filter.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.bfMexistsAndForget(List<String> args)
    Checks whether one or more items exist in a Bloom Filter.

    Creates a new Bloom Filter.
    RedisAPI

    Begins an incremental save of the bloom filter.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.bfScandumpAndForget(List<String> args)
    Unlike the bare Vert.x variant, this method ignores the Response result or any failure.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.bgrewriteaofAndForget()
    Asynchronously rewrites the append-only file to disk.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.bgsaveAndForget(List<String> args)
    Asynchronously saves the database(s) to disk.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.bitcountAndForget(List<String> args)
    Counts the number of set bits (population counting) in a string.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.bitfieldAndForget(List<String> args)
    Performs arbitrary bitfield integer operations on strings.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.bitfieldRoAndForget(List<String> args)
    Performs arbitrary read-only bitfield integer operations on strings.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.bitopAndForget(List<String> args)
    Performs bitwise operations on multiple strings, and stores the result.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.bitposAndForget(List<String> args)
    Finds the first set (1) or clear (0) bit in a string.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.blmoveAndForget(String arg0, String arg1, String arg2, String arg3, String arg4)
    Pops an element from a list, pushes it to another list and returns it.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.blmpopAndForget(List<String> args)
    Pops the first element from one of multiple lists.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.blpopAndForget(List<String> args)
    Removes and returns the first element in a list.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.brpopAndForget(List<String> args)
    Removes and returns the last element in a list.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.brpoplpushAndForget(String arg0, String arg1, String arg2)
    Deprecated.
    since Redis 6.2.0, replaced by: BLMOVE with the RIGHT and LEFT arguments
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.bzmpopAndForget(List<String> args)
    Removes and returns a member by score from one or more sorted sets.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.bzpopmaxAndForget(List<String> args)
    Removes and returns the member with the highest score from one or more sorted sets.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.bzpopminAndForget(List<String> args)
    Removes and returns the member with the lowest score from one or more sorted sets.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.cfAddAndForget(String arg0, String arg1)
    Adds an item to a Cuckoo Filter.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.cfAddAndForget(List<String> args)
    Unlike the bare Vert.x variant, this method ignores the Response result or any failure.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.cfAddnxAndForget(String arg0, String arg1)
    Adds an item to a Cuckoo Filter if the item did not exist previously.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.cfAddnxAndForget(List<String> args)
    Unlike the bare Vert.x variant, this method ignores the Response result or any failure.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.cfCompactAndForget(List<String> args)
    Unlike the bare Vert.x variant, this method ignores the Response result or any failure.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.cfCountAndForget(String arg0, String arg1)
    Return the number of times an item might be in a Cuckoo Filter.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.cfCountAndForget(List<String> args)
    Unlike the bare Vert.x variant, this method ignores the Response result or any failure.

    Unlike the bare Vert.x variant, this method ignores the Response result or any failure.

    Unlike the bare Vert.x variant, this method ignores the Response result or any failure.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.cmsInitbydimAndForget(String arg0, String arg1, String arg2)
    Initializes a Count-Min Sketch to dimensions specified by user.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.cmsInitbydimAndForget(List<String> args)
    Unlike the bare Vert.x variant, this method ignores the Response result or any failure.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.cmsInitbyprobAndForget(String arg0, String arg1, String arg2)
    Initializes a Count-Min Sketch to accommodate requested tolerances.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.cmsInitbyprobAndForget(List<String> args)
    Unlike the bare Vert.x variant, this method ignores the Response result or any failure.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.cmsMergeAndForget(List<String> args)
    Merges several sketches into one sketch.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.cmsQueryAndForget(List<String> args)
    Returns the count for one or more items in a sketch.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.commandAndForget(List<String> args)
    Returns detailed information about all commands.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.configAndForget(List<String> args)
    A container for server configuration commands.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.copyAndForget(List<String> args)
    Copies the value of a key to a new key.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.dbsizeAndForget()
    Returns the number of keys in the database.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.debugAndForget(List<String> args)
    A container for debugging commands.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.decrAndForget(String arg0)
    Decrements the integer value of a key by one.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.decrbyAndForget(String arg0, String arg1)
    Decrements a number from the integer value of a key.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.delAndForget(List<String> args)
    Deletes one or more keys.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.delexAndForget(List<String> args)
    Conditionally removes the specified key based on value or digest comparison.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.digestAndForget(String arg0)
    Returns the XXH3 hash of a string value.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.discardAndForget()
    Discards a transaction.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.dumpAndForget(String arg0)
    Returns a serialized representation of the value stored at a key.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.echoAndForget(String arg0)
    Returns the given string.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.evalAndForget(List<String> args)
    Executes a server-side Lua script.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.evalRoAndForget(List<String> args)
    Executes a read-only server-side Lua script.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.evalshaAndForget(List<String> args)
    Executes a server-side Lua script by SHA1 digest.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.evalshaRoAndForget(List<String> args)
    Executes a read-only server-side Lua script by SHA1 digest.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.execAndForget()
    Executes all commands in a transaction.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.existsAndForget(List<String> args)
    Determines whether one or more keys exist.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.expireAndForget(List<String> args)
    Sets the expiration time of a key in seconds.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.expireatAndForget(List<String> args)
    Sets the expiration time of a key to a Unix timestamp.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.expiretimeAndForget(String arg0)
    Returns the expiration time of a key as a Unix timestamp.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.failoverAndForget(List<String> args)
    Starts a coordinated failover from a server to one of its replicas.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.fcallAndForget(List<String> args)
    Invokes a function.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.fcallRoAndForget(List<String> args)
    Invokes a read-only function.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.flushallAndForget(List<String> args)
    Removes all keys from all databases.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.flushdbAndForget(List<String> args)
    Remove all keys from the current database.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.ftAddAndForget(List<String> args)
    Unlike the bare Vert.x variant, this method ignores the Response result or any failure.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.ftAggregateAndForget(List<String> args)
    Run a search query on an index and perform aggregate transformations on the results.

    Adds an alias to the index.

    Adds an alias to the index.

    Deletes an alias from the index.

    Deletes an alias from the index.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.ftAliasupdateAndForget(List<String> args)
    Adds or updates an alias to the index.
    RedisAPI

    Adds a new field to the index.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.ftAlterifnxAndForget(List<String> args)
    Adds a new field to the index.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.ftConfigAndForget(List<String> args)
    Unlike the bare Vert.x variant, this method ignores the Response result or any failure.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.ftCreateAndForget(List<String> args)
    Creates an index with the given spec.

    Creates an index with the given spec.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.ftCursorAndForget(List<String> args)
    Unlike the bare Vert.x variant, this method ignores the Response result or any failure.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.ftDebugAndForget(List<String> args)
    Deprecated.
    this command no longer exists in the latest Redis release
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.ftDelAndForget(List<String> args)
    Unlike the bare Vert.x variant, this method ignores the Response result or any failure.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.ftDictaddAndForget(List<String> args)
    Adds terms to a dictionary.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.ftDictdelAndForget(List<String> args)
    Deletes terms from a dictionary.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.ftDictdumpAndForget(List<String> args)
    Dumps all terms in the given dictionary.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.ftDropAndForget(List<String> args)
    Unlike the bare Vert.x variant, this method ignores the Response result or any failure.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.ftDropifxAndForget(List<String> args)
    Unlike the bare Vert.x variant, this method ignores the Response result or any failure.

    RedisAPI.ftDropindexAndForget(List<String> args)
    Deletes the index.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.ftDropindexifxAndForget(List<String> args)
    Deletes the index.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.ftExplainAndForget(List<String> args)
    Returns the execution plan for a complex query.

    RedisAPI.ftExplaincliAndForget(List<String> args)
    Returns the execution plan for a complex query.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.ftGetAndForget(List<String> args)
    Unlike the bare Vert.x variant, this method ignores the Response result or any failure.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.ftHybridAndForget(List<String> args)
    Performs hybrid search combining text search and vector similarity search.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.ftInfoAndForget(List<String> args)
    Returns information and statistics on the index.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.ftListAndForget(List<String> args)
    Returns a list of all existing indexes.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.ftMgetAndForget(List<String> args)
    Unlike the bare Vert.x variant, this method ignores the Response result or any failure.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.ftProfileAndForget(List<String> args)
    Performs a `FT.SEARCH` or `FT.AGGREGATE` command and collects performance information.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.ftSafeaddAndForget(List<String> args)
    Unlike the bare Vert.x variant, this method ignores the Response result or any failure.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.ftSearchAndForget(List<String> args)
    Searches the index with a textual query, returning either documents or just ids.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.ftSpellcheckAndForget(List<String> args)
    Performs spelling correction on a query, returning suggestions for misspelled terms.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.ftSugaddAndForget(List<String> args)
    Adds a suggestion string to an auto-complete suggestion dictionary.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.ftSugdelAndForget(List<String> args)
    Deletes a string from a suggestion index.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.ftSuggetAndForget(List<String> args)
    Gets completion suggestions for a prefix.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.ftSuglenAndForget(List<String> args)
    Gets the size of an auto-complete suggestion dictionary.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.ftSynaddAndForget(List<String> args)
    Unlike the bare Vert.x variant, this method ignores the Response result or any failure.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.ftSyndumpAndForget(List<String> args)
    Dumps the contents of a synonym group.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.ftSynupdateAndForget(List<String> args)
    Creates or updates a synonym group with additional terms.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.ftTagvalsAndForget(List<String> args)
    Returns the distinct tags indexed in a Tag field.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.functionAndForget(List<String> args)
    A container for function commands.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.geoaddAndForget(List<String> args)
    Adds one or more members to a geospatial index.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.geodistAndForget(List<String> args)
    Returns the distance between two members of a geospatial index.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.geohashAndForget(List<String> args)
    Returns members from a geospatial index as geohash strings.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.geoposAndForget(List<String> args)
    Returns the longitude and latitude of members from a geospatial index.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.georadiusAndForget(List<String> args)
    Deprecated.
    since Redis 6.2.0, replaced by: GEOSEARCH and GEOSEARCHSTORE with the BYRADIUS argument
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.georadiusbymemberAndForget(List<String> args)
    Deprecated.
    since Redis 6.2.0, replaced by: GEOSEARCH and GEOSEARCHSTORE with the BYRADIUS and FROMMEMBER arguments
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.georadiusbymemberRoAndForget(List<String> args)
    Deprecated.
    since Redis 6.2.0, replaced by: GEOSEARCH with the BYRADIUS and FROMMEMBER arguments
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.georadiusRoAndForget(List<String> args)
    Deprecated.
    since Redis 6.2.0, replaced by: GEOSEARCH with the BYRADIUS argument
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.geosearchAndForget(List<String> args)
    Queries a geospatial index for members inside an area of a box or a circle.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.geosearchstoreAndForget(List<String> args)
    Queries a geospatial index for members inside an area of a box or a circle, optionally stores the result.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.getAndForget(String arg0)
    Returns the string value of a key.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.getbitAndForget(String arg0, String arg1)
    Returns a bit value by offset.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.getdelAndForget(String arg0)
    Returns the string value of a key after deleting the key.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.getexAndForget(List<String> args)
    Returns the string value of a key after setting its expiration time.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.getrangeAndForget(String arg0, String arg1, String arg2)
    Returns a substring of the string stored at a key.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.getsetAndForget(String arg0, String arg1)
    Deprecated.
    since Redis 6.2.0, replaced by: SET with the !GET argument
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.graphBulkAndForget(List<String> args)
    Deprecated.
    this command no longer exists in the latest Redis release
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.graphConfigAndForget(List<String> args)
    Deprecated.
    this command no longer exists in the latest Redis release
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.graphDebugAndForget(List<String> args)
    Deprecated.
    this command no longer exists in the latest Redis release
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.graphDeleteAndForget(List<String> args)
    Deprecated.
    this command no longer exists in the latest Redis release

    Deprecated.
    this command no longer exists in the latest Redis release

    RedisAPI.graphListAndForget(List<String> args)
    Deprecated.
    this command no longer exists in the latest Redis release
    RedisAPI

    Deprecated.
    this command no longer exists in the latest Redis release

    Deprecated.
    this command no longer exists in the latest Redis release

    RedisAPI.graphRoQueryAndForget(List<String> args)
    Deprecated.
    this command no longer exists in the latest Redis release
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.graphSlowlogAndForget(List<String> args)
    Deprecated.
    this command no longer exists in the latest Redis release
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.hdelAndForget(List<String> args)
    Deletes one or more fields and their values from a hash.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.helloAndForget(List<String> args)
    Handshakes with the Redis server.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.hexistsAndForget(String arg0, String arg1)
    Determines whether a field exists in a hash.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.hexpireAndForget(List<String> args)
    Set expiry for hash field using relative time to expire (seconds).
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.hexpireatAndForget(List<String> args)
    Set expiry for hash field using an absolute Unix timestamp (seconds).
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.hexpiretimeAndForget(List<String> args)
    Returns the expiration time of a hash field as a Unix timestamp, in seconds.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.hgetallAndForget(String arg0)
    Returns all fields and values in a hash.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.hgetAndForget(String arg0, String arg1)
    Returns the value of a field in a hash.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.hgetdelAndForget(List<String> args)
    Returns the value of a field and deletes it from the hash.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.hgetexAndForget(List<String> args)
    Get the value of one or more fields of a given hash key, and optionally set their expiration.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.hincrbyAndForget(String arg0, String arg1, String arg2)
    Increments the integer value of a field in a hash by a number.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.hincrbyfloatAndForget(String arg0, String arg1, String arg2)
    Increments the floating point value of a field by a number.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.hkeysAndForget(String arg0)
    Returns all fields in a hash.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.hlenAndForget(String arg0)
    Returns the number of fields in a hash.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.hmgetAndForget(List<String> args)
    Returns the values of all fields in a hash.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.hmsetAndForget(List<String> args)
    Deprecated.
    since Redis 4.0.0, replaced by: HSET with multiple field-value pairs
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.hotkeysAndForget(List<String> args)
    A container for hotkeys tracking commands.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.hpersistAndForget(List<String> args)
    Removes the expiration time for each specified field.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.hpexpireAndForget(List<String> args)
    Set expiry for hash field using relative time to expire (milliseconds).
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.hpexpireatAndForget(List<String> args)
    Set expiry for hash field using an absolute Unix timestamp (milliseconds).
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.hpexpiretimeAndForget(List<String> args)
    Returns the expiration time of a hash field as a Unix timestamp, in msec.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.hpttlAndForget(List<String> args)
    Returns the TTL in milliseconds of a hash field.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.hrandfieldAndForget(List<String> args)
    Returns one or more random fields from a hash.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.hscanAndForget(List<String> args)
    Iterates over fields and values of a hash.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.hsetAndForget(List<String> args)
    Creates or modifies the value of a field in a hash.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.hsetexAndForget(List<String> args)
    Set the value of one or more fields of a given hash key, and optionally set their expiration.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.hsetnxAndForget(String arg0, String arg1, String arg2)
    Sets the value of a field in a hash only when the field doesn't exist.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.hstrlenAndForget(String arg0, String arg1)
    Returns the length of the value of a field.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.httlAndForget(List<String> args)
    Returns the TTL in seconds of a hash field.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.hvalsAndForget(String arg0)
    Returns all values in a hash.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.incrAndForget(String arg0)
    Increments the integer value of a key by one.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.incrbyAndForget(String arg0, String arg1)
    Increments the integer value of a key by a number.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.incrbyfloatAndForget(String arg0, String arg1)
    Increment the floating point value of a key by a number.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.infoAndForget(List<String> args)
    Returns information and statistics about the server.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.jsonArrappendAndForget(List<String> args)
    Append the JSON values into the array at path after the last element in it.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.jsonArrindexAndForget(List<String> args)
    Search for the first occurrence of a JSON value in an array.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.jsonArrinsertAndForget(List<String> args)
    Insert the json values into the array at path before the index (shifts to the right).
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.jsonArrlenAndForget(List<String> args)
    Report the length of the JSON array at path in key.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.jsonArrpopAndForget(List<String> args)
    Remove and return the element at the specified index in the array at path.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.jsonArrtrimAndForget(String arg0, String arg1, String arg2, String arg3)
    Trim an array so that it contains only the specified inclusive range of elements.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.jsonArrtrimAndForget(List<String> args)
    Unlike the bare Vert.x variant, this method ignores the Response result or any failure.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.jsonClearAndForget(List<String> args)
    Clear container values (arrays/objects) and set numeric values to 0.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.jsonDebugAndForget(List<String> args)
    This is a container command for debugging related tasks.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.jsonDelAndForget(List<String> args)
    Delete a value.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.jsonForgetAndForget(List<String> args)
    Delete a value.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.jsonGetAndForget(List<String> args)
    Get JSON value at path.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.jsonMergeAndForget(List<String> args)
    Merge a given JSON value into matching paths.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.jsonMgetAndForget(List<String> args)
    Return the values at path from multiple key arguments.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.jsonMsetAndForget(List<String> args)
    Set or update one or more JSON values according to the specified key-path-value triplets.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.jsonNumincrbyAndForget(String arg0, String arg1, String arg2)
    Increment the number value stored at path by number.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.jsonNumincrbyAndForget(List<String> args)
    Unlike the bare Vert.x variant, this method ignores the Response result or any failure.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.jsonNummultbyAndForget(String arg0, String arg1, String arg2)
    Multiply the number value stored at path by number.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.jsonNummultbyAndForget(List<String> args)
    Unlike the bare Vert.x variant, this method ignores the Response result or any failure.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.jsonNumpowbyAndForget(String arg0, String arg1, String arg2)
    Raise the number value stored at path to the power of number.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.jsonNumpowbyAndForget(List<String> args)
    Unlike the bare Vert.x variant, this method ignores the Response result or any failure.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.jsonObjkeysAndForget(List<String> args)
    Return the keys in the object that's referenced by path.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.jsonObjlenAndForget(List<String> args)
    Report the number of keys in the JSON object at path in key.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.jsonRespAndForget(List<String> args)
    Return the JSON in key in Redis serialization protocol specification form.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.jsonSetAndForget(List<String> args)
    Set the JSON value at path in key.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.jsonStrappendAndForget(List<String> args)
    Append the json-string values to the string at path.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.jsonStrlenAndForget(List<String> args)
    Report the length of the JSON String at path in key.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.jsonToggleAndForget(String arg0, String arg1)
    Toggle the boolean value stored at path.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.jsonToggleAndForget(List<String> args)
    Unlike the bare Vert.x variant, this method ignores the Response result or any failure.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.jsonTypeAndForget(List<String> args)
    Report the type of JSON value at path.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.keysAndForget(String arg0)
    Returns all key names that match a pattern.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.lastsaveAndForget()
    Returns the Unix timestamp of the last successful save to disk.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.latencyAndForget(List<String> args)
    A container for latency diagnostics commands.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.lcsAndForget(List<String> args)
    Finds the longest common substring.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.lindexAndForget(String arg0, String arg1)
    Returns an element from a list by its index.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.linsertAndForget(String arg0, String arg1, String arg2, String arg3)
    Inserts an element before or after another element in a list.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.llenAndForget(String arg0)
    Returns the length of a list.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.lmoveAndForget(String arg0, String arg1, String arg2, String arg3)
    Returns an element after popping it from one list and pushing it to another.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.lmpopAndForget(List<String> args)
    Returns multiple elements from a list after removing them.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.lolwutAndForget(List<String> args)
    Displays computer art and the Redis version.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.lpopAndForget(List<String> args)
    Returns the first elements in a list after removing it.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.lposAndForget(List<String> args)
    Returns the index of matching elements in a list.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.lpushAndForget(List<String> args)
    Prepends one or more elements to a list.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.lpushxAndForget(List<String> args)
    Prepends one or more elements to a list only when the list exists.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.lrangeAndForget(String arg0, String arg1, String arg2)
    Returns a range of elements from a list.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.lremAndForget(String arg0, String arg1, String arg2)
    Removes elements from a list.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.lsetAndForget(String arg0, String arg1, String arg2)
    Sets the value of an element in a list by its index.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.ltrimAndForget(String arg0, String arg1, String arg2)
    Removes elements from both ends a list.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.memoryAndForget(List<String> args)
    A container for memory diagnostics commands.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.mgetAndForget(List<String> args)
    Atomically returns the string values of one or more keys.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.migrateAndForget(List<String> args)
    Atomically transfers a key from one Redis instance to another.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.moduleAndForget(List<String> args)
    A container for module commands.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.monitorAndForget()
    Listens for all requests received by the server in real-time.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.moveAndForget(String arg0, String arg1)
    Moves a key to another database.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.msetAndForget(List<String> args)
    Atomically creates or modifies the string values of one or more keys.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.msetexAndForget(List<String> args)
    Atomically sets multiple string keys with a shared expiration in a single operation.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.msetnxAndForget(List<String> args)
    Atomically modifies the string values of one or more keys only when all keys don't exist.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.multiAndForget()
    Starts a transaction.
    static RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.newInstance(io.vertx.redis.client.RedisAPI delegate)
    Creates a new instance of the RedisAPI.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.objectAndForget(List<String> args)
    A container for object introspection commands.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.persistAndForget(String arg0)
    Removes the expiration time of a key.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.pexpireAndForget(List<String> args)
    Sets the expiration time of a key in milliseconds.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.pexpireatAndForget(List<String> args)
    Sets the expiration time of a key to a Unix milliseconds timestamp.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.pexpiretimeAndForget(String arg0)
    Returns the expiration time of a key as a Unix milliseconds timestamp.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.pfaddAndForget(List<String> args)
    Adds elements to a HyperLogLog key.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.pfcountAndForget(List<String> args)
    Returns the approximated cardinality of the set(s) observed by the HyperLogLog key(s).
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.pfdebugAndForget(String arg0, String arg1)
    Internal commands for debugging HyperLogLog values.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.pfmergeAndForget(List<String> args)
    Merges one or more HyperLogLog values into a single key.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.pfselftestAndForget()
    An internal command for testing HyperLogLog values.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.pingAndForget(List<String> args)
    Returns the server's liveliness response.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.psetexAndForget(String arg0, String arg1, String arg2)
    Deprecated.
    since Redis 2.6.12, replaced by: SET with the PX argument
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.psubscribeAndForget(List<String> args)
    Listens for messages published to channels that match one or more patterns.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.psyncAndForget(List<String> args)
    An internal command used in replication.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.pttlAndForget(String arg0)
    Returns the expiration time in milliseconds of a key.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.publishAndForget(String arg0, String arg1)
    Posts a message to a channel.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.pubsubAndForget(List<String> args)
    A container for Pub/Sub commands.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.punsubscribeAndForget(List<String> args)
    Stops listening to messages published to channels that match one or more patterns.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.quitAndForget(List<String> args)
    Deprecated.
    since Redis 7.2.0, replaced by: just closing the connection
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.randomkeyAndForget()
    Returns a random key name from the database.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.readonlyAndForget()
    Enables read-only queries for a connection to a Redis Cluster replica node.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.readwriteAndForget()
    Enables read-write queries for a connection to a Reids Cluster replica node.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.renameAndForget(String arg0, String arg1)
    Renames a key and overwrites the destination.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.renamenxAndForget(String arg0, String arg1)
    Renames a key only when the target key name doesn't exist.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.replconfAndForget(List<String> args)
    An internal command for configuring the replication stream.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.replicaofAndForget(String arg0, String arg1)
    Configures a server as replica of another, or promotes it to a master.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.resetAndForget()
    Resets the connection.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.restoreAndForget(List<String> args)
    Creates a key from the serialized representation of a value.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.restoreAskingAndForget(List<String> args)
    An internal command for migrating keys in a cluster.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.roleAndForget()
    Returns the replication role.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.rpopAndForget(List<String> args)
    Returns and removes the last elements of a list.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.rpoplpushAndForget(String arg0, String arg1)
    Deprecated.
    since Redis 6.2.0, replaced by: LMOVE with the RIGHT and LEFT arguments
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.rpushAndForget(List<String> args)
    Appends one or more elements to a list.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.rpushxAndForget(List<String> args)
    Appends an element to a list only when the list exists.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.saddAndForget(List<String> args)
    Adds one or more members to a set.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.saveAndForget()
    Synchronously saves the database(s) to disk.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.scanAndForget(List<String> args)
    Iterates over the key names in the database.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.scardAndForget(String arg0)
    Returns the number of members in a set.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.scriptAndForget(List<String> args)
    A container for Lua scripts management commands.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.sdiffAndForget(List<String> args)
    Returns the difference of multiple sets.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.sdiffstoreAndForget(List<String> args)
    Stores the difference of multiple sets in a key.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.searchClusterinfoAndForget(List<String> args)
    Unlike the bare Vert.x variant, this method ignores the Response result or any failure.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.searchClusterrefreshAndForget(List<String> args)
    Unlike the bare Vert.x variant, this method ignores the Response result or any failure.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.searchClustersetAndForget(List<String> args)
    Unlike the bare Vert.x variant, this method ignores the Response result or any failure.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.selectAndForget(String arg0)
    Changes the selected database.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.setAndForget(List<String> args)
    Sets the string value of a key, ignoring its type.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.setbitAndForget(String arg0, String arg1, String arg2)
    Sets or clears the bit at offset of the string value.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.setexAndForget(String arg0, String arg1, String arg2)
    Deprecated.
    since Redis 2.6.12, replaced by: SET with the EX argument
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.setnxAndForget(String arg0, String arg1)
    Deprecated.
    since Redis 2.6.12, replaced by: SET with the NX argument
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.setrangeAndForget(String arg0, String arg1, String arg2)
    Overwrites a part of a string value with another by an offset.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.shutdownAndForget(List<String> args)
    Synchronously saves the database(s) to disk and shuts down the Redis server.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.sinterAndForget(List<String> args)
    Returns the intersect of multiple sets.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.sintercardAndForget(List<String> args)
    Returns the number of members of the intersect of multiple sets.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.sinterstoreAndForget(List<String> args)
    Stores the intersect of multiple sets in a key.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.sismemberAndForget(String arg0, String arg1)
    Determines whether a member belongs to a set.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.slaveofAndForget(String arg0, String arg1)
    Deprecated.
    since Redis 5.0.0, replaced by: REPLICAOF
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.slowlogAndForget(List<String> args)
    A container for slow log commands.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.smembersAndForget(String arg0)
    Returns all members of a set.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.smismemberAndForget(List<String> args)
    Determines whether multiple members belong to a set.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.smoveAndForget(String arg0, String arg1, String arg2)
    Moves a member from one set to another.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.sortAndForget(List<String> args)
    Sorts the elements in a list, a set, or a sorted set, optionally storing the result.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.sortRoAndForget(List<String> args)
    Returns the sorted elements of a list, a set, or a sorted set.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.spopAndForget(List<String> args)
    Returns one or more random members from a set after removing them.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.spublishAndForget(String arg0, String arg1)
    Post a message to a shard channel.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.srandmemberAndForget(List<String> args)
    Get one or multiple random members from a set.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.sremAndForget(List<String> args)
    Removes one or more members from a set.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.sscanAndForget(List<String> args)
    Iterates over members of a set.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.ssubscribeAndForget(List<String> args)
    Listens for messages published to shard channels.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.strlenAndForget(String arg0)
    Returns the length of a string value.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.subscribeAndForget(List<String> args)
    Listens for messages published to channels.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.substrAndForget(String arg0, String arg1, String arg2)
    Deprecated.
    since Redis 2.0.0, replaced by: GETRANGE
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.sunionAndForget(List<String> args)
    Returns the union of multiple sets.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.sunionstoreAndForget(List<String> args)
    Stores the union of multiple sets in a key.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.sunsubscribeAndForget(List<String> args)
    Stops listening to messages posted to shard channels.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.swapdbAndForget(String arg0, String arg1)
    Swaps two Redis databases.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.syncAndForget()
    An internal command used in replication.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.tdigestAddAndForget(List<String> args)
    Adds one or more observations to a t-digest sketch.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.tdigestByrankAndForget(List<String> args)
    Returns, for each input rank, an estimation of the value (floating-point) with that rank.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.tdigestByrevrankAndForget(List<String> args)
    Returns, for each input reverse rank, an estimation of the value (floating-point) with that reverse rank.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.tdigestCdfAndForget(List<String> args)
    Returns, for each input value, an estimation of the floating-point fraction of (observations smaller than the given value + half the observations equal to the given value).
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.tdigestCreateAndForget(List<String> args)
    Allocates memory and initializes a new t-digest sketch.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.tdigestInfoAndForget(String arg0)
    Returns information and statistics about a t-digest sketch.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.tdigestInfoAndForget(List<String> args)
    Unlike the bare Vert.x variant, this method ignores the Response result or any failure.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.tdigestMaxAndForget(String arg0)
    Returns the maximum observation value from a t-digest sketch.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.tdigestMaxAndForget(List<String> args)
    Unlike the bare Vert.x variant, this method ignores the Response result or any failure.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.tdigestMergeAndForget(List<String> args)
    Merges multiple t-digest sketches into a single sketch.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.tdigestMinAndForget(String arg0)
    Returns the minimum observation value from a t-digest sketch.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.tdigestMinAndForget(List<String> args)
    Unlike the bare Vert.x variant, this method ignores the Response result or any failure.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.tdigestQuantileAndForget(List<String> args)
    Returns, for each input fraction, an estimation of the value (floating point) that is smaller than the given fraction of observations.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.tdigestRankAndForget(List<String> args)
    Returns, for each input value (floating-point), the estimated rank of the value (the number of observations in the sketch that are smaller than the value + half the number of observations that are equal to the value).
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.tdigestResetAndForget(String arg0)
    Resets a t-digest sketch: empty the sketch and re-initializes it.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.tdigestResetAndForget(List<String> args)
    Unlike the bare Vert.x variant, this method ignores the Response result or any failure.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.tdigestRevrankAndForget(List<String> args)
    Returns, for each input value (floating-point), the estimated reverse rank of the value (the number of observations in the sketch that are larger than the value + half the number of observations that are equal to the value).
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.tdigestTrimmedMeanAndForget(String arg0, String arg1, String arg2)
    Returns an estimation of the mean value from the sketch, excluding observation values outside the low and high cutoff quantiles.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.tdigestTrimmedMeanAndForget(List<String> args)
    Unlike the bare Vert.x variant, this method ignores the Response result or any failure.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.timeAndForget()
    Returns the server time.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.timeseriesClustersetAndForget(List<String> args)
    Unlike the bare Vert.x variant, this method ignores the Response result or any failure.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.timeseriesClustersetfromshardAndForget(List<String> args)
    Deprecated.
    this command no longer exists in the latest Redis release
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.timeseriesHelloAndForget(List<String> args)
    Deprecated.
    this command no longer exists in the latest Redis release
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.timeseriesInfoclusterAndForget(List<String> args)
    Deprecated.
    this command no longer exists in the latest Redis release
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.timeseriesInnercommunicationAndForget(List<String> args)
    Deprecated.
    this command no longer exists in the latest Redis release
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.timeseriesNetworktestAndForget(List<String> args)
    Deprecated.
    this command no longer exists in the latest Redis release
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.timeseriesRefreshclusterAndForget(List<String> args)
    Unlike the bare Vert.x variant, this method ignores the Response result or any failure.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.topkAddAndForget(List<String> args)
    Adds an item to a Top-k sketch.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.topkCountAndForget(List<String> args)
    Return the count for one or more items are in a sketch.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.topkIncrbyAndForget(List<String> args)
    Increases the count of one or more items by increment.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.topkInfoAndForget(String arg0)
    Returns information about a sketch.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.topkInfoAndForget(List<String> args)
    Unlike the bare Vert.x variant, this method ignores the Response result or any failure.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.topkListAndForget(List<String> args)
    Return the full list of items in Top-K sketch.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.topkQueryAndForget(List<String> args)
    Checks whether one or more items are in a sketch.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.topkReserveAndForget(List<String> args)
    Initializes a Top-K sketch with specified parameters.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.touchAndForget(List<String> args)
    Returns the number of existing keys out of those specified after updating the time they were last accessed.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.trimslotsAndForget(List<String> args)
    Trim the keys that belong to specified slots.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.tsAddAndForget(List<String> args)
    Append a sample to a time series.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.tsAlterAndForget(List<String> args)
    Update the retention, chunk size, duplicate policy, and labels of an existing time series.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.tsCreateAndForget(List<String> args)
    Create a new time series.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.tsCreateruleAndForget(List<String> args)
    Create a compaction rule.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.tsDecrbyAndForget(List<String> args)
    Decrease the value of the latest sample.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.tsDelAndForget(String arg0, String arg1, String arg2)
    Delete all samples between two timestamps for a given time series.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.tsDelAndForget(List<String> args)
    Unlike the bare Vert.x variant, this method ignores the Response result or any failure.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.tsDeleteruleAndForget(String arg0, String arg1)
    Delete a compaction rule.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.tsDeleteruleAndForget(List<String> args)
    Unlike the bare Vert.x variant, this method ignores the Response result or any failure.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.tsGetAndForget(List<String> args)
    Get the sample with the highest timestamp from a given time series.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.tsIncrbyAndForget(List<String> args)
    Increase the value of the latest sample.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.tsInfoAndForget(List<String> args)
    Returns information and statistics for a time series.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.tsMaddAndForget(List<String> args)
    Append new samples to one or more time series.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.tsMgetAndForget(List<String> args)
    Get the sample with the highest timestamp from each time series matching a specific filter.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.tsMrangeAndForget(List<String> args)
    Query a range across multiple time series by filters in forward direction.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.tsMrevrangeAndForget(List<String> args)
    Query a range across multiple time series by filters in reverse direction.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.tsQueryindexAndForget(List<String> args)
    Get all time series keys matching a filter list.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.tsRangeAndForget(List<String> args)
    Query a range in forward direction.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.tsRevrangeAndForget(List<String> args)
    Query a range in reverse direction.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.ttlAndForget(String arg0)
    Returns the expiration time in seconds of a key.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.typeAndForget(String arg0)
    Determines the type of value stored at a key.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.unlinkAndForget(List<String> args)
    Asynchronously deletes one or more keys.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.unsubscribeAndForget(List<String> args)
    Stops listening to messages posted to channels.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.unwatchAndForget()
    Forgets about watched keys of a transaction.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.vaddAndForget(List<String> args)
    Add one or more elements to a vector set, or update its vector if it already exists.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.vcardAndForget(String arg0)
    Return the number of elements in a vector set.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.vdimAndForget(String arg0)
    Return the dimension of vectors in the vector set.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.vembAndForget(List<String> args)
    Return the vector associated with an element.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.vgetattrAndForget(String arg0, String arg1)
    Retrieve the JSON attributes of elements.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.vinfoAndForget(String arg0)
    Return information about a vector set.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.vismemberAndForget(String arg0, String arg1)
    Check if an element exists in a vector set.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.vlinksAndForget(List<String> args)
    Return the neighbors of an element at each layer in the HNSW graph.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.vrandmemberAndForget(List<String> args)
    Return one or multiple random members from a vector set.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.vrangeAndForget(List<String> args)
    Return vector set elements in a lex range.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.vremAndForget(String arg0, String arg1)
    Remove an element from a vector set.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.vsetattrAndForget(String arg0, String arg1, String arg2)
    Associate or remove the JSON attributes of elements.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.vsimAndForget(List<String> args)
    Return elements by vector similarity.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.waitAndForget(String arg0, String arg1)
    Blocks until the asynchronous replication of all preceding write commands sent by the connection is completed.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.waitaofAndForget(String arg0, String arg1, String arg2)
    Blocks until all of the preceding write commands sent by the connection are written to the append-only file of the master and/or replicas.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.watchAndForget(List<String> args)
    Monitors changes to keys to determine the execution of a transaction.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.xackAndForget(List<String> args)
    Returns the number of messages that were successfully acknowledged by the consumer group member of a stream.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.xackdelAndForget(List<String> args)
    Acknowledges and deletes one or multiple messages for a stream consumer group.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.xaddAndForget(List<String> args)
    Appends a new message to a stream.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.xautoclaimAndForget(List<String> args)
    Changes, or acquires, ownership of messages in a consumer group, as if the messages were delivered to as consumer group member.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.xcfgsetAndForget(List<String> args)
    Sets the IDMP configuration parameters for a stream.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.xclaimAndForget(List<String> args)
    Changes, or acquires, ownership of a message in a consumer group, as if the message was delivered a consumer group member.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.xdelAndForget(List<String> args)
    Returns the number of messages after removing them from a stream.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.xdelexAndForget(List<String> args)
    Deletes one or multiple entries from the stream.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.xgroupAndForget(List<String> args)
    A container for consumer groups commands.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.xidmprecordAndForget(String arg0, String arg1, String arg2, String arg3)
    An internal command for setting IDMP metadata on an existing stream message.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.xinfoAndForget(List<String> args)
    A container for stream introspection commands.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.xlenAndForget(String arg0)
    Return the number of messages in a stream.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.xpendingAndForget(List<String> args)
    Returns the information and entries from a stream consumer group's pending entries list.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.xrangeAndForget(List<String> args)
    Returns the messages from a stream within a range of IDs.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.xreadAndForget(List<String> args)
    Returns messages from multiple streams with IDs greater than the ones requested.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.xreadgroupAndForget(List<String> args)
    Returns new or historical messages from a stream for a consumer in a group.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.xrevrangeAndForget(List<String> args)
    Returns the messages from a stream within a range of IDs in reverse order.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.xsetidAndForget(List<String> args)
    An internal command for replicating stream values.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.xtrimAndForget(List<String> args)
    Deletes messages from the beginning of a stream.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.zaddAndForget(List<String> args)
    Adds one or more members to a sorted set, or updates their scores.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.zcardAndForget(String arg0)
    Returns the number of members in a sorted set.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.zcountAndForget(String arg0, String arg1, String arg2)
    Returns the count of members in a sorted set that have scores within a range.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.zdiffAndForget(List<String> args)
    Returns the difference between multiple sorted sets.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.zdiffstoreAndForget(List<String> args)
    Stores the difference of multiple sorted sets in a key.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.zincrbyAndForget(String arg0, String arg1, String arg2)
    Increments the score of a member in a sorted set.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.zinterAndForget(List<String> args)
    Returns the intersect of multiple sorted sets.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.zintercardAndForget(List<String> args)
    Returns the number of members of the intersect of multiple sorted sets.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.zinterstoreAndForget(List<String> args)
    Stores the intersect of multiple sorted sets in a key.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.zlexcountAndForget(String arg0, String arg1, String arg2)
    Returns the number of members in a sorted set within a lexicographical range.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.zmpopAndForget(List<String> args)
    Returns the highest- or lowest-scoring members from one or more sorted sets after removing them.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.zmscoreAndForget(List<String> args)
    Returns the score of one or more members in a sorted set.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.zpopmaxAndForget(List<String> args)
    Returns the highest-scoring members from a sorted set after removing them.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.zpopminAndForget(List<String> args)
    Returns the lowest-scoring members from a sorted set after removing them.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.zrandmemberAndForget(List<String> args)
    Returns one or more random members from a sorted set.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.zrangeAndForget(List<String> args)
    Returns members in a sorted set within a range of indexes.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.zrangebylexAndForget(List<String> args)
    Deprecated.
    since Redis 6.2.0, replaced by: ZRANGE with the BYLEX argument
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.zrangebyscoreAndForget(List<String> args)
    Deprecated.
    since Redis 6.2.0, replaced by: ZRANGE with the BYSCORE argument
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.zrangestoreAndForget(List<String> args)
    Stores a range of members from sorted set in a key.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.zrankAndForget(String arg0, String arg1)
    Unlike the bare Vert.x variant, this method ignores the Response result or any failure.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.zrankAndForget(List<String> args)
    Returns the index of a member in a sorted set ordered by ascending scores.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.zremAndForget(List<String> args)
    Removes one or more members from a sorted set.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.zremrangebylexAndForget(String arg0, String arg1, String arg2)
    Removes members in a sorted set within a lexicographical range.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.zremrangebyrankAndForget(String arg0, String arg1, String arg2)
    Removes members in a sorted set within a range of indexes.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.zremrangebyscoreAndForget(String arg0, String arg1, String arg2)
    Removes members in a sorted set within a range of scores.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.zrevrangeAndForget(List<String> args)
    Deprecated.
    since Redis 6.2.0, replaced by: ZRANGE with the REV argument
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.zrevrangebylexAndForget(List<String> args)
    Deprecated.
    since Redis 6.2.0, replaced by: ZRANGE with the REV and BYLEX arguments
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.zrevrangebyscoreAndForget(List<String> args)
    Deprecated.
    since Redis 6.2.0, replaced by: ZRANGE with the REV and BYSCORE arguments
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.zrevrankAndForget(String arg0, String arg1)
    Unlike the bare Vert.x variant, this method ignores the Response result or any failure.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.zrevrankAndForget(List<String> args)
    Returns the index of a member in a sorted set ordered by descending scores.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.zscanAndForget(List<String> args)
    Iterates over members and scores of a sorted set.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.zscoreAndForget(String arg0, String arg1)
    Returns the score of a member in a sorted set.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.zunionAndForget(List<String> args)
    Returns the union of multiple sorted sets.
    RedisAPI
    RedisAPI.zunionstoreAndForget(List<String> args)
    Stores the union of multiple sorted sets in a key.
